sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46363" key="zumi/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζυμ-ίωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ζύμωσις</ref></xr>, subject of lost work by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> </bibl> Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.216B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.216B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
